UNLESS ONE OF THE PARTIES CONTESTS THIS TENTATIVE RULING, THIS CASE WILL BE ASSIGNED TO JUDGE WISS AND THE MOTION WILL BE HEARD BY HER ON A DATE AND TIME TO BE DETERMINED LATER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG. [302]

Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Text Ruling

MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE (And Notice Of Motion), Injunctive, And Declaratory Relief For Violations Of The California Public Records Act; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Kelly Aviles; Declaration Of Edward J. Donahue Iii, Exhibits A-L
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PETITIONER SAN DIEGO COUNTY WATER AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE, Injunctive, And Declaratory Relief For Violations Of The California Public Records Act as follows:

This case appears to be related to CPF-16-515282 which has been assigned to Judge Wiss in department 305 for all purposes. Unless one of the parties contests this tentative ruling, this case will be assigned to Judge Wiss and the motion will be heard by her on a date and time to be determined later.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
